human_minutes_estimate: 217 rows; estimate 2-5 minutes per row depending on edits
validation_command: python src\run_batch.py validate_review && python src\run_batch.py review_report && python src\preflight_remaining_gates.py
done_when: Review decisions are present for the release slice and print-ready rows are nonzero.

human_minutes_estimate: 320 rows; estimate 1-3 minutes per row for labeling
validation_command: python src\gold_status.py gold\_human_gold_review.csv && python src\gold_validate.py gold\_human_gold_review.csv && python src\gold_packet_verify.py gold\_human_gold_review.csv gold\reviewer_packets
done_when: gold_status.py reports 320/320 complete and gold_validate.py passes.

human_minutes_estimate: 80 rows; estimate 1-3 minutes per row for independent second review
validation_command: python src\gold_double_review_verify.py gold\_double_review_queue.csv --sample-size 80 && python src\gold_ingest_double_review.py gold\_double_review_queue.csv gold\double_review_labels.jsonl && python src\gold_agreement.py
done_when: The 80-row queue validates, labels are ingested, and an agreement report exists.

human_minutes_estimate: Max Workflow run time plus audit; human action is save fresh wf_output.json
validation_command: python src\pilot\root_window_status.py sTA && python src\pilot\audit_window.py wf_output.json --root sTA --write-requeue
done_when: Fresh sTA output is audited; requeue.keys.txt is empty or has been rerun; judge_sample.keys.txt is handled.

human_minutes_estimate: Saves broad manual browsing by using ranked queues first
done_when: Human semantic review starts from high-confidence risks and judge samples, not whole-window browsing.

validation_command: Manual editorial sign-off; no code validation yet
done_when: Entry shape, abbreviation display, NWS rows, Nachträge display, and provenance policy are accepted before renderer work begins.
